name: Conscript
description: The 'fighter' of Spheres of Might - trades a large chunk of its bonus feats for combat talents instead, making it the most build-flexible martial base class.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Armiger
description: A weapon-focused martial who bonds with a customizable 'signature weapon' that adapts to whatever fighting style the player wants.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Blacksmith
description: A martial artisan who enhances allies' gear and breaks down enemy equipment, built around the Equipment sphere and crafting-focused talents.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Commander
description: A battlefield tactician built around the Warleader sphere, directing and empowering allies rather than fighting alone.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Scholar
description: A knowledge-focused martial hybrid with an unusually wide skill list, trading raw combat power for versatility and utility talents.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Sentinel
description: A defensive frontliner built around the Guardian sphere, drawing enemy attention and protecting allies.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Striker
description: A mobile, precision-focused martial who favors speed and decisive strikes over raw durability.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)

name: Technician
description: A gadgeteer built around the Alchemy and Tinker-adjacent talents, solving problems with invented devices as much as weapons.
source: Spheres of Might (stats are a reasonable estimate, not yet cross-checked against the wiki)
